final:
// // This module generates a carry-out signal. It sets the carry-out to HIGH when the reset is active, and follows the carry-in on the falling edge of the clock when enabled.
module top_module(
    input carry_in,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg carry_out
    );always @(posedge clk, posedge rst) begin
        if (rst == 1'b1) begin
            carry_out = 1'b0;
        end else if (en == 1'b1) begin
            carry_out = carry_in;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module generates a carry-out signal. It sets the carry-out to HIGH when the reset is active, and follows the carry-in on the falling edge of the clock when enabled.
